function.name: exec_sys_cmd
function.description: Execute a shell command on the user's local machine through a Desktop Provider endpoint tool. Dangerous commands may be blocked by the local provider policy.

function.name: list_workspaces
function.description: List available workspaces and show which workspace is currently active. Workspaces are preference and locality scopes, not hard visibility boundaries.

include_endpoints.description: Include endpoint providers registered in each workspace.

session_id.description: Optional session id. Defaults to the current runtime session.

function.name: switch_workspace
function.description: Switch the current runtime session to a different active workspace. Workspaces are preference and locality scopes, not hard visibility boundaries.

workspace_id.description: Target workspace public id, such as personal, desktop-main, study, or home-lab.

session_id.description: Optional session id. Defaults to the current runtime session.

function.name: ask_human
function.description: Ask the human a follow-up question and continue the same tool-calling round after the reply arrives.

options.description: Optional ordered options for a single-choice reply.

function.name: get_current_system_time
function.description: Get the real current system time from the host machine.

function.name: get_sys_vitals
function.description: Get host machine vitals such as CPU and memory usage.

function.name: manage_heartbeat_settings
function.description: Read or update Scheduler-owned system.heartbeat settings and idle proactive-poke settings.

action.description: Use get to inspect system.heartbeat plus idle settings, or update to change allowed fields.

updates.description: Allowed keys: system_heartbeat_enabled, system_heartbeat_interval_seconds, heartbeat_idle_poke_enabled, heartbeat_idle_poke_after_seconds, heartbeat_idle_poke_cooldown_seconds, heartbeat_idle_context_compaction_enabled.

function.name: list_endpoint_tool_targets
function.description: List online Endpoint execution targets that can execute tools, optionally scoped to a workspace and tool key.

tool_key.description: Optional endpoint capability tool key, such as file.read or shell.exec.

function.name: list_active_endpoints
function.description: List currently online Endpoint websocket connections, optionally scoped to a workspace or thread.

function.name: send_endpoint_message
function.description: Send a realtime notice or dispatch an Endpoint tool call to a target Endpoint other than the normal current-session reply path. Do not use this to answer the originating user or to send progress updates to the same endpoint; use emit_progress_notice for progress and the final assistant answer for the actual reply. Use only when the user explicitly asks to notify or call a specific target Endpoint.

function.name: emit_progress_notice
function.description: Send a brief standalone assistant reply to the current session while the current turn is still thinking or tool-calling. You must call this before any potentially time-consuming operation, including web/page reading, research, local file or workspace work, endpoint tool calls, endpoint messaging, or other slow I/O. For non-streaming external endpoints such as Feishu or WeChat/MeetWeChat, call this before a nontrivial or multi-sentence final answer unless the answer is immediate and very short. May be called multiple times.

content.description: A short standalone reply, ideally one sentence.

function.name: restart_core
function.description: Restart the Core Service after validating the admin password.

function.name: research_topic
function.description: Research a topic using the configured search and source-reading chain.

query.description: The topic or question to research.

function.name: inspect_page
function.description: Inspect a direct webpage or PDF URL.

function.name: search_knowledge
function.description: Search private knowledge such as memory or connected knowledge sources.

function.name: manage_tasks
function.description: Create, list, inspect, update, complete, delete, or restore user TODO items.

function.name: manage_procedures
function.description: Inspect procedures or propose creating, updating, deleting, pinning, or unpinning a procedure through the approval callback flow.

applicable_modes.description: V4 public assistant modes only: general, automation, or danxi. Research, documents, and study are skills/source profiles inside general, not modes.

function.name: list_attachments
function.description: List attachments for a specific owner and return metadata with lifecycle timestamps.

function.name: read_attachment
function.description: Read attachment metadata and optionally include a bounded content preview for text or binary files.

function.name: delete_attachment
function.description: Delete an attachment record and remove its stored object when available.

function.name: manage_scheduled_jobs
function.description: Manage V4 Scheduler jobs backed by scheduled_jobs. Use this for system.heartbeat inspection, ordinary scheduled job CRUD, enable/disable, interval updates, and manual triggers.

job_id.description: Stable Scheduler job id, for example system.heartbeat.

workspace_id.description: Workspace public id when the job is workspace scoped.

interval_seconds.description: Shortcut for trigger_config.interval_seconds on interval jobs.

action_ref.description: Core workflow/action reference. Ordinary jobs should use core.workflow.assistant_turn.

run_template.description: Assistant turn template for core.workflow.assistant_turn jobs. Common fields: prompt, messages, thread_id, create_thread, tool_bundle, mcp_servers, preferred_tool_key, preferred_target_endpoint_ids, preferred_endpoint_provider_types, tool_target_routing_policy, max_rounds.

delivery_policy.description: Delivery policy for produced messages and run events. Common fields: thread_id, session_id, targets[{endpoint_id,message_type,offline_policy}].

function.name: list_skills
function.description: List the currently available open skills.

function.name: load_skill
function.description: Load a skill by identifier and optionally inject it into the current route context.

function.name: create_skill
function.description: Create a new reusable skill in the open skill registry.

applicable_modes.description: V4 public assistant modes only: general, automation, or danxi. Research, documents, and study are skills/source profiles inside general, not modes.

function.name: summarize_text
function.description: Summarize raw text into a concise digest or outline without relying on external MCP integrations.

function.name: organize_notes
function.description: Reshape rough notes into structured sections and rendered markdown.

function.name: extract_action_items
function.description: Extract likely action items, due hints, and owner hints from free-form notes.

function.name: remember_knowledge
function.description: Persist durable user or project knowledge into long-term memory.

function.name: analyze_workspace
function.description: Analyze a local workspace or folder and summarize its structure.

function.name: read_local_documents
function.description: Read files from the user's local machine through a Desktop Provider endpoint tool and extract normalized content chunks.

function.name: write_local_document
function.description: Write a document on the user's local machine through a Desktop Provider endpoint tool, usually in preview mode first. The local provider enforces trusted write roots.

function.name: rewrite_local_document
function.description: Rewrite an existing document on the user's local machine through a Desktop Provider endpoint tool. The local provider enforces trusted write roots.

function.name: compile_report
function.description: Compile a structured report from collected materials or sections.

function.name: manage_schedule
function.description: Create or draft a schedule item, or list existing schedule drafts.

function.name: draft_message
function.description: Draft a message or email from structured context.

function.name: meeting_brief
function.description: Prepare a structured meeting brief from agenda inputs or notes.

function.name: sync_notes
function.description: Normalize notes into a sync-ready structure.

function.name: build_study_plan
function.description: Build a study plan from materials or goals.

function.name: extract_learning_points
function.description: Extract key learning points from study material.

function.name: quiz_me
function.description: Generate quiz questions from provided study material.

function.name: generate_flashcards
function.description: Generate flashcards from study material.

function.name: track_mastery
function.description: Track mastery state for a study topic.

function.name: danxi_login
function.description: Log into Danxi (FDUHole) with user credentials and optionally enable WebVPN transport when direct access is unavailable.

function.name: danxi_logout
function.description: Clear a cached Danxi session.

function.name: danxi_get_session_status
function.description: Inspect the current Danxi session, transport mode, and cached profile state.

function.name: danxi_list_divisions
function.description: List Danxi forum divisions available to the current user.

function.name: danxi_list_tags
function.description: List Danxi forum tags for drafting or filtering posts.

function.name: danxi_list_posts
function.description: Browse Danxi homepage posts or posts under a specific division.

function.name: danxi_get_post
function.description: Fetch a single Danxi post by hole id.

function.name: danxi_list_floors
function.description: List replies (floors) for a Danxi post.

function.name: danxi_search_posts
function.description: Search Danxi floors and return grouped post hits.

function.name: danxi_create_post
function.description: Create a normal-user Danxi post in a division.

function.name: danxi_reply_post
function.description: Reply to a Danxi post as a normal user.

function.name: danxi_edit_reply
function.description: Edit a Danxi reply owned by the current user when the API permits it.

function.name: danxi_delete_reply
function.description: Delete a Danxi reply after explicit confirmation.

function.name: danxi_delete_post
function.description: Delete a Danxi post after explicit confirmation.

function.name: danxi_manage_favorite
function.description: List, add, or remove Danxi favorites for the current user.

function.name: danxi_manage_subscription
function.description: List, add, or remove Danxi subscriptions for the current user.

function.name: danxi_list_messages
function.description: Read Danxi station messages for the current user.

function.name: danxi_mark_message_read
function.description: Mark a Danxi message as read or unread.

function.name: danxi_set_webvpn_cookie
function.description: Attach or refresh a WebVPN cookie for the current Danxi session.

function.name: danxi_clear_webvpn_cookie
function.description: Clear the cached WebVPN cookie from the current Danxi session.

function.name: manage_memories
function.description: List, inspect, edit, invalidate, forget, or delete memory objects.

function.name: search_memory
function.description: Search long-term memory using natural language.

function.name: get_background_status
function.description: Get current background and heartbeat status.

function.name: search_web
function.description: Search the web using the configured web-search backend.

max_results.description: Optional maximum number of search results.

quality.description: Optional speed/quality mode. Defaults to adaptive.

function.name: read_web_page
function.description: Read and extract a direct webpage or PDF URL.
